subcodes.first_line: O thou whose breast is dilated through the remembrance of God! This contingent world is a darksome realm of physical and spiritual grief and woe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صدر منشرح بذکر الله این عالم امکان ظلمتگاه غموم و هموم جسمانی و روحانی و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
